Home.title: Where stone becomes timeless design
Home.description: Alkan Marble & Stone supplies and executes premium marble, granite, and natural stone for residential, commercial, and architectural projects with refined craftsmanship and luxury standards.
Home.aboutTitle: Premium stone solutions shaped by craftsmanship and architectural taste
Home.aboutText1: We create refined marble, granite, and stone applications for projects that demand elegance, precision, and long-lasting aesthetic value.
Home.aboutText2: From luxury interiors to distinctive feature walls and premium facades, our work combines material excellence with reliable execution and a clear eye for detail.
Home.valueCard1Desc: Carefully selected marble, granite, and natural stone for elegant and durable high-end applications.
Home.valueCard2Desc: A practical project approach supported by workmanship, precision, and site-focused delivery.
Home.valueCard3Desc: Finishes that feel luxurious, timeless, and suitable for premium residential and commercial environments.
Home.materialsTitle: Curated materials for elegant and timeless spaces
Home.servicesTitle: Complete stone solutions for refined and exceptional projects
Home.servicesDesc: From material supply to professional execution, we deliver premium marble, granite, and natural stone solutions tailored for luxury residential and commercial environments.
Home.service1Desc: Premium sourcing of marble, granite, and natural stone selected for durability, elegance, and timeless appeal.
Home.service2Desc: Professional implementation supported by precision, site expertise, and finishing standards suited for premium projects.
Home.service3Desc: Bespoke solutions for floors, walls, facades, and architectural details tailored to each project identity.
Home.projectsTitle: A curated view of our project execution and design impact
Home.projectsDesc: Explore selected project visuals that reflect our attention to quality, detail, and refined architectural finishing.
Home.partnersDesc: We are proud to collaborate with trusted partners who share our commitment to quality, excellence, and long-term success in every project we deliver.
Home.footerDesc: Premium marble, granite, and natural stone solutions for distinguished residential, commercial, and architectural projects.
Home.footerCopyright: © 2026 Alkan Marble & Granite & Stone Company. All rights reserved.

Materials.label: Our Materials
Materials.title: Curated materials for elegant and timeless spaces
Materials.description: Explore our premium collection of marble, granite, and natural stone designed for luxury and architectural excellence.
Materials.marbleDesc: Explore a refined selection of premium marble surfaces curated for luxury interiors, architectural projects, and timeless design applications.
Materials.graniteDesc: Discover our premium granite selection engineered for durability, strength, and long-lasting performance. Ideal for high-traffic areas, exterior applications, and architectural designs that require both resilience and refined aesthetics.
Materials.stoneDesc: Explore our natural stone collection selected for texture, warmth, and architectural character. These stone surfaces are ideal for facades, walls, landscapes, and refined interior applications that require timeless natural presence.

Services.label: Our Services
Services.title: Complete marble and stone solutions
Services.description: We provide end-to-end services from material supply to professional execution with high standards.
Services.service1Desc: We provide high-quality marble, granite, and natural stone materials selected for durability and elegance.
Services.service2Desc: Professional project execution supported by precision, expertise, and high finishing standards.
Services.service3Desc: Design and execution of customized stone solutions tailored to each project.
Services.process2Desc: Selecting suitable materials and defining execution strategy.

About.heroTitle: A refined vision in marble, granite, and stone
About.heroDesc: Alkan Marble & Stone combines premium material expertise, factory capability, and refined execution standards to support luxury residential, hospitality, and commercial projects.
About.introTitle: Turning natural stone into timeless architectural value
About.introDesc1: At Alkan, we specialize in supplying and executing premium marble, granite, and stone with a clear focus on quality, durability, detail, and elevated design standards.
About.introDesc2: Our work is built around carefully selected materials, refined finishing, practical experience, and dependable delivery that help transform ambitious concepts into distinguished built spaces.
About.factoryTitle: A factory built for precision, consistency, and large-scale execution
About.factoryDesc: Our factory is equipped with advanced infrastructure and specialized machinery to support high-quality production, precise cutting, detailed shaping, and efficient processing across a wide range of marble and stone applications.
About.factoryCard1Desc: Heavy-duty granite cutting equipment designed for accurate and efficient processing of large-format slabs with improved speed and reduced material waste.
About.factoryCard2Desc: CNC-supported processing for shaping, engraving, drilling, and detailed architectural stone work with consistent finish quality and precision.
About.factoryCard3Desc: A production environment structured for continuous workflow, polished finishing, and reliable preparation for projects that require speed, control, and premium quality standards.
About.whyTitle: Strength in materials, confidence in execution
About.whyCard1Desc: A selected portfolio of marble, granite, and stone for refined and durable applications.
About.whyCard2Desc: In-house production support with machinery and processes built for precision, preparation, and consistency.
About.whyCard3Desc: Execution standards focused on finishing quality, detail control, and project readiness.
About.whyCard4Desc: Reliable support for residential, hospitality, and commercial projects that demand premium results.
About.ctaTitle: Partner with Alkan for premium materials, factory support, and refined execution

Careers.heroTitle: Build your future with Alkan Marble & Stone
Careers.heroDesc: We are always looking for talented professionals who are passionate about quality, craftsmanship, and excellence in marble, stone, and granite solutions.
Careers.introDesc: At Alkan, we value professionalism, precision, and long-term growth. Our team works on premium marble and stone solutions for residential, commercial, and custom architectural projects.
Careers.card1Desc: Be part of a company focused on refined execution, strong craftsmanship, and premium design standards.
Careers.card2Desc: We welcome motivated professionals across operations, sales, projects, engineering, production, and administration.
Careers.card3Desc: We believe in responsibility, quality, teamwork, and client satisfaction at every stage.
Careers.formDesc: Fill in your details and upload your CV in PDF format.
Careers.uploadNote: Please upload your CV in PDF format only.
Careers.successMessage: Application submitted successfully. We will contact you soon.
